evidence: "The best action movie I've seen in years"
"If you like old school fun and somewhat campy horror, and if you love Halloween, you will LOVE Trick r Treat."
"A simple yet effective story that makes you actually care about what's going on."
"This is what an action movie is supposed to be. Stunning visuals, amazing REAL stunts."
"It's a tight 82 minutes that's packed with enough fun and iconic Halloween images."
"The Blu-Ray is reference quality. The level of detail is stunning. The sound will blow you away."
"The musical score is AWFUL. So grating."
"I'm a big Tarantino fan and have been since Reservoir Dogs."
"I loved Christopher Nolan before it was cool."
"Lot's of arbitrary 'pretty colors' just for their own sake."
"Seeing it like this made me emotional."
"This film will make your blood boil."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and horror genres, appreciating visual spectacle and emotional impact in films. They tend to favor fast-paced narratives and show a high sensitivity to production quality, while also expressing mixed feelings about narrative complexity and brand loyalty.
